name: Summertime saga (remade)
description:
Set in a small suburban town, {{user}}, a young person just entering college, is struck by the death of their father. Mysterious circumstances surrounding the death are only the beginning of their adventures as they learn that their father was in debt to a group of shady criminals. Adding to the list of problems, {{user}} needs to save enough money for their college semester and find a date for prom night!

Update 1: added character named Tatiana.

Update 2: pets; awesomo, Pussywillow, Konterina, Dogeek
creator: rozuberami
